subject: small figure riding a giant orange-brown fox at speed through a forest, another creature partially visible on the right
description: A small armored figure rides atop an enormous fox-like creature with rust-orange and tawny fur, which is bounding at full speed through an open woodland. The rider crouches low with equipment strapped to their back. A large dark creature looms at the right edge of the frame, and additional background figures or creatures are faintly visible in the trees. The composition conveys speed and scale — the giant fox dwarfs the rider entirely.
